context: Evaluates the agent's ability to stop the review mid-way when the user cancels and produce a partial report.

checklist.name: Stops immediately
checklist.description: No further standards are presented after the cancellation signal

checklist.name: Partial recap of assessed standards
checklist.description: Only the 3 assessed standards appear in the recap

checklist.name: Partial report notes unassessed
checklist.description: The report explicitly states 2 standards were not reviewed and why
